launch.note: Post this first, then PIN it to the top of your profile.
launch.caption:
PropSight is live. The free way to see Singapore property clearly.

Value any HDB or condo on real recent sales. Work out what you can truly afford. Dig into deep research on every project and town. Read the news that actually matters, in plain English.

And Aillie, your property intelligence, answers anything, anytime.

Start free at propsight.sg (link in bio). Join free to unlock the full research, a weekly newsletter and live market signals.

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdb #condosingapore #propertyinvestment
launch.alt: PropSight on a laptop and a phone, free Singapore property intelligence at propsight.sg
launch.caption_zh:
PropSight 正式上线了。看清新加坡房产，免费就能办到。

根据真实近期成交，为任何 HDB 或 condo 估值。算清楚自己真正能负担多少。深入研究每个项目和地区的详细资料。用简单易懂的英文，读到真正重要的资讯。

还有你的房产智能助手 Aillie，随时随地解答任何问题。

免费上手，访问 propsight.sg（链接在简介）。注册免费，解锁完整研究资料、每周通讯和实时市场动态。

posts.note: Midweek. A market read, insight or news story people save and share.
posts.caption:
Over 1 million HDB households get July utility and service charge rebates
The rebate lands automatically on your July utility bill and town council statement, so you pay less without doing anything.
One move: open both statements side by side in July and confirm the rebate actually showed up, because errors happen and nobody refunds what you never checked.
Check yours free at propsight.sg (link in bio)
#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdb #hdbresale #towncouncil
posts.alt: Property news, Over 1 Million HDB Households to Receive Utility and Service Charge Rebates in July
posts.caption_zh:
超过100万个HDB住户将在7月收到水电费及服务费回扣。

回扣会自动反映在你7月的水电账单和市镇理事会账单上，什么都不需要做，账单自然就少了。

只做一件事：7月份把这两张账单并排对照一下，确认回扣真的有到账。毕竟难免出错，没有查过的钱，没有人会主动退给你。

免费到propsight.sg查看你的情况（链接在简介）

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdb #hdbresale #towncouncil

posts.note: Start of the week, strongest reach. A hook or myth to stop the scroll.
posts.caption:
Stamp duty on your first home? Here's the truth.
Everyone swears you pay extra ABSD the moment you buy. Not true.
A Singapore citizen pays 0% ABSD on their first home.
It only starts from your second property, so your first buy is cleaner than people warn you.
Check yours free at propsight.sg (link in bio)
#singaporeproperty #propertysg #absd #stampduty #firsthome
posts.caption_zh:
买第一套房要交印花税？来，把这件事说清楚。

很多人斩钉截铁地说，一买房就得多交 ABSD。其实不对。

新加坡公民买第一套房，ABSD 是 0%。

从第二套房开始才算，所以买第一套，比大家讲的要简单多了。

免费到 propsight.sg 查一查你的情况（链接在简介）

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #absd #stampduty #firsthome

posts.note: Weekend scroll. A quick tool or tip people act on.
posts.caption:
The price is never the price.

On a $1.65M home you're really looking at about $117k more, stamp duty, legal fees and renovation, before you get the keys.

Work out your real total free at propsight.sg (link in bio).

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #sgproperty #stampduty #homebuying
posts.alt: The real cost of a home
posts.caption_zh:
价格，从来都不只是价格。

买一套 $1.65M 的房子，你实际要准备的，可不止这个数。印花税、律师费、装修费全加起来，差不多还要多付约 $117k，才能真正拿到钥匙。

免费在 propsight.sg 算出你的实际总开销（链接在简介）。
